# orphan-etalon fixture — a valid etalon nothing points at

Structurally valid, and sitting right next to `pointed.md` in the same
references/ directory, but `SKILL.md` never names this file — dead weight the
reader will never be sent to.

## Files

- `{shared-lib}/unpointed.ts`

**File:** `{shared-lib}/unpointed.ts`

```ts
export function unpointed() {
  return true
}
```
